title: Use containers/common's formats package instead of our own
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind cleanup

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Use the containers/common "formats" package, which started off as a copy of our own and is still mostly the same, instead of our own.

Use the "formats" package to format `info` and `inspect` output, so that template users will be able to use whatever functions are provided with `images` and `containers` output, including "json", "lower", and "upper".

#### How to verify it

Shouldn't require new tests.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

Fixes #6241

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```
